title: narcissus luteolentus
intro: Narcissus luteolentus, also known as the yellow-flowering daffodil, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Narcissus luteolentus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential toxicity.
